● 💡 No copilot instructions found. Run /init to generate a copilot-instructions.md file for this project.

● Folder /workspace/tmp has been added to trusted folders.

   file and session context to understand what was being worked on.

  Let me check the plan file and look at the current state of the repository.

● Check plan file
  $ cat /home/dh.kam/.copilot/session-state/1ce1572a-f894-4860-a47e-38c5427ed489/plan.md 2>/dev/null || echo "NO PLAN FILE"
  └ 2 lines...

● Check git log and status
  $ cd /workspace/tmp && git --no-pager log --oneline -10 && echo "---" && git --no-pager status
  └ 402 lines...

  include some new Kotlin files and new scripts. Let me look at the modified files more carefully.

  Let me check the diff for the modified files to understand what's happening.

● Check diff overview and README changes
  $ cd /workspace/tmp && git --no-pager diff --stat HEAD 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo "---" && git --no-pager diff HEAD -- README.md | head -50
  └ 53 lines...

◐ I can see there's a significant amount of changes here. It looks like someone has been working on a "Go-native parity gate" (r8_go) project. Let me look at the new files to
  understand the scope of changes.
